word: G2314 - θεομάχος - theomáchos - theh-om'-akh-os - To fight against God

sections.paragraph:
- Original: θεόμαχος

- Transliteration: theomachos

- Phonetic: theh-om'-akh-os

- Definition:

1. fighting against God, resisting God

- Origin: from G2316 and G3164

- TDNT entry: 12:48,6

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G2316 and G3164; an opponent of deity: - to fight against God.
